hero.title: Balance Your
hero.subtitle: Smart team generation for League of Legends communities. Rank-aware, role-aware, constraint-supported — because fair teams make better games.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Paste up to 10 Riot IDs. We fetch rank and match history automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Keep teammates together or force rivals apart. We handle impossible cases.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Our algorithm finds the most balanced split — not just by rank, but by real role fit.

input.title: Create Your Lobby
input.subtitle: Enter 10 players for a 5v5 match
input.playersPlaceholder:
Enter Riot IDs, one per line
Format: PlayerName#TAG

Example:
Hide on bush#KR1
Faker#KR1
Gumayusi#T1
input.playersHint: Enter exactly 10 players for a 5v5 match
input.parseError: Could not parse: {id} — use format Name#TAG

constraint.title: Team Constraints
constraint.subtitle: Optionally force players together or apart
constraint.noConstraintsHint: Players will be split by the algorithm
constraint.impossibleDetail: The combined constraints cannot be satisfied. Please review.

errors.riotApi: Could not connect to Riot API. Check your API key.
errors.playerNotFound: {name} was not found. Verify the Riot ID.
errors.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalidInput: Invalid input. Please check your entries.
errors.constraintImpossible: Your constraints cannot be satisfied. A player cannot be on both teams.
errors.optimizerFailed: Could not find a valid team split. Check your constraints.
errors.emptyFields: {count} players have an empty name or tag.
errors.missingPrimaryWithSecondary: Primary position required for: {names} (secondary-only is not enough)
errors.constraintConflict: {a} and {b} cannot be on the same team AND different teams.
errors.constraintGroupTooLarge: Same-team group has {count} players — max is 5. ({names})
errors.apiKeyExpired: API key expired. Try again later, or enter players manually.

lobby.notFoundDetail: This lobby link may have expired or been deleted.

footer.tagline: Balanced teams for better in-house games.
footer.disclaimer: teammaker.lol is not endorsed by Riot Games and does not reflect the views or opinions of Riot Games or anyone officially involved in producing or managing Riot Games properties.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: teammaker.lol ("we", "us") is a free tool for generating balanced League of Legends in-house teams. The service can be used without an account. Optional Google sign-in enables personalized features such as saving player profiles for quick re-use.
privacy.dataCollectedBody:
We collect only the data needed to operate the service:
- Riot IDs (gameName + tagLine) you enter
- Publicly available match and ranked data fetched from the Riot Games API
- Generated team results (stored temporarily for sharing purposes)
- Basic server request logs (IP address, timestamp, request path) for security and debugging

If you sign in with Google, we additionally collect:
- Your Google account email address and display name
- Your Google profile picture URL
- An OAuth token to authenticate your session (we do not store passwords)
privacy.dataNot:
We do not collect:
- Passwords or account credentials
- Payment information
- Personal demographic data
- Any data from your Google account beyond name, email, and profile picture
privacy.dataUseBody:
Data is used solely to:
- Resolve Riot accounts and fetch match/rank data from the Riot API
- Generate balanced team compositions
- Cache API responses to reduce repeated calls and improve performance
- Provide shareable lobby links
- (Signed-in users) Save and restore player tier/role profiles across sessions
privacy.cacheBody:
Player rank and match data is cached in our database for up to 30 minutes to improve performance and reduce Riot API calls. Generated lobby results may be retained for up to 7 days for sharing purposes, then automatically deleted.

For signed-in users, saved player profiles are stored until you delete them or close your account.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: We use the Riot Games API to fetch publicly available player data. We use Google OAuth (via Google's authentication service) for optional sign-in. Use of these services is subject to their respective privacy policies. We do not share your data with any other third parties.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use a secure, HTTP-only session cookie to maintain your login state if you sign in with Google. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
privacy.rightsBody: You may request deletion of any data associated with your account by contacting us. For signed-in users, you can delete your saved players at any time from the app. If you used the service without signing in, there is no persistent personal profile to delete.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptBody: By using teammaker.lol, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.serviceBody: teammaker.lol is a free, community tool that uses publicly available League of Legends data from the Riot Games API to generate balanced in-house team compositions. The service is provided as-is for entertainment and community use.
terms.useBody:
You may use this service for:
- Personal and community in-house match organization
- Non-commercial use

You may not:
- Use the service to harass or target individuals
- Attempt to reverse-engineer, scrape, or abuse the service
- Misrepresent the results as official or endorsed by Riot Games
- Use the service in ways that violate Riot Games' Terms of Service
terms.accuracyBody: Team balance scores are estimates based on publicly available data and algorithmic inference. They do not guarantee competitive fairness. Do not use this tool for high-stakes competitive decisions where fairness must be verified independently.
terms.liabilityBody: teammaker.lol is provided without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from use of this service, including but not limited to unfair game outcomes, data inaccuracies, or service interruptions.
terms.riotBody: teammaker.lol is not endorsed by Riot Games and does not reflect the views or opinions of Riot Games. League of Legends and Riot Games are trademarks or registered trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of any changes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a question, bug report, or feedback?
contact.emailDetail: The best way to reach us is by email:
contact.bugDetail: Please include: the players you entered, the platform/server, and a description of what went wrong.
contact.featureDetail: We'd love to hear what would make teammaker.lol more useful for your community.
contact.responseTime: We aim to respond within a few business days.
contact.note: Note: We cannot provide player account support. For Riot account issues, please contact Riot Games support directly.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.riotBody: teammaker.lol was created under Riot Games' Legal Jibber Jabber policy using assets owned by Riot Games. Riot Games does not endorse or sponsor this project.
legal.riotApiBody: This application uses the Riot Games API to access publicly available player data including ranked statistics and match history. All data is fetched in accordance with Riot's API usage policies and rate limits.
legal.trademarkBody: League of Legends, Riot Games, and related marks are trademarks of Riot Games, Inc. This site is not affiliated with or endorsed by Riot Games.
legal.dataBody: All player data displayed on this site is derived from the Riot Games API and may not reflect real-time information. There may be delays due to caching. Team balance scores are algorithmic estimates and do not represent official rankings or guaranteed competitive fairness.

positionHelp.title: How to Select Positions
positionHelp.primaryDesc: Main lane. Highest priority in team assignment. Multiple allowed.
positionHelp.secondaryDesc: Playable lane. Considered when primary isn't possible.
positionHelp.deselectDesc: Off-role penalty applied. Less likely to be assigned this lane.
positionHelp.warning: Players without a primary position cannot generate teams.

save.loginPromptInput: Sign in to save player data and load it quickly next time
save.loginPromptResult: Sign in to save player tier data for quick reloading
save.savePromptSaved: Player data saved. Load them instantly next time.
